creator: nork@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 20 Oct 2007 09:43:24 -0400 (EDT)
"Robert C. Noland III" <rnoland@2hip.net> wrote:
> --- cdrdao-1.2.2.patch begins here ---
> Index: files/patch-configure
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/sysutils/cdrdao/files/patch-configure,v
> retrieving revision 1.7
> diff -u -r1.7 patch-configure
> --- files/patch-configure	29 Nov 2005 21:21:23 -0000	1.7
> +++ files/patch-configure	20 Oct 2007 13:41:26 -0000
> @@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
> ---- configure.orig	Mon Oct  7 03:53:55 2002
> -+++ configure	Sat Oct 12 18:06:18 2002
> +--- configure.orig	2006-09-20 06:51:25.000000000 -0400
> ++++ configure	2007-10-20 09:39:45.000000000 -0400
>  @@ -310,7 +310,7 @@
>   # include <unistd.h>
>   #endif"
> @@ -586,6 +586,15 @@
>   fi
>   
>   
> +@@ -10336,7 +10250,7 @@
> +     *-freebsd2*)
> + 			       scsilib_libs="$scsilib_libs"
> + 			       ;;
> +-    *-freebsd[34567]*)
> ++    *-freebsd[345678]*)
> + 			       scsilib_libs="$scsilib_libs -lcam"
> + 			       ;;
> +   esac
>  @@ -10612,146 +10526,200 @@
>   
>   if test "$with_ogg_support" = yes; then
> --- cdrdao-1.2.2.patch ends here ---

	I have same patch depressed by another step:-).  It's support
	FreeBSD9 and 10.x~19.x, too, maybe:-).

Index: files/patch-configure
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/sysutils/cdrdao/files/patch-configure,v
retrieving revision 1.7
diff -u -r1.7 patch-configure
--- files/patch-configure	29 Nov 2005 21:21:23 -0000	1.7
+++ files/patch-configure	20 Oct 2007 14:15:05 -0000
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
---- configure.orig	Mon Oct  7 03:53:55 2002
-+++ configure	Sat Oct 12 18:06:18 2002
+--- configure.orig	2006-09-20 19:51:25.000000000 +0900
++++ configure	2007-10-20 23:13:47.000000000 +0900
 @@ -310,7 +310,7 @@
  # include <unistd.h>
  #endif"
@@ -586,6 +586,33 @@
  fi
  
  
+@@ -10336,7 +10250,7 @@
+     *-freebsd2*)
+ 			       scsilib_libs="$scsilib_libs"
+ 			       ;;
+-    *-freebsd[34567]*)
++    *-freebsd[34567891]*)
+ 			       scsilib_libs="$scsilib_libs -lcam"
+ 			       ;;
+   esac
+@@ -10355,7 +10269,7 @@
+ 	       scsilib_objs="ScsiIf-linux.o sg_err.o"
+ 	       ;;
+ 
+-    *-freebsd[34567]*)
++    *-freebsd[34567891]*)
+ 	       scsilib_libs="-lcam"
+ 	       scsilib_objs="ScsiIf-freebsd-cam.o"
+ 	       ;;
+@@ -10601,7 +10515,7 @@
+ esac
+ 
+ case "$host" in
+-  *-linux* | *-freebsd[4567]* | *-solaris*)
++  *-linux* | *-freebsd[4567891]* | *-solaris*)
+ 	     sound_if_obj=SoundIF-ao.o
+ 	     ;;
+ 
 @@ -10612,146 +10526,200 @@
  
  if test "$with_ogg_support" = yes; then
